About

Hi, I’m Hailey Ni. I recently graduated from NUS with an MSc in Management, focusing on Marketing & Strategic Operations. Having lived and worked across multiple countries, I bring a natural global, cross-cultural mindset to everything I do — allowing me to think outside the box, see the whole picture, and also focus on small critical details.

From early experiences as a diver, Latin dancer, and painter to exploring diverse professional fields in adulthood, I have always embraced uncertainty and chased new challenges. I’m truly grateful for the constant encouragement from my family and friends, as well as for those who have doubted me — their feedback pushes me to my limits, and both positive and challenging experiences have shaped me into a stronger, better version of myself.

I love bringing people together and getting hands-on work done well. Highlights from my experience include leading a large-scale international cultural festival for more than 2,000 participants, plus building AI-powered web and mobile tools on my own — both taught me how to plan projects, solve real-world problems, and adapt fast.

I thrive on challenges and I’m a lifelong learner who stays curious about the world. I really enjoy working with others and building positive, collaborative team energy, and I keep a grounded, mindful approach through meditation, Pilates, and painting.

Recommendation

"

I am happy to make this recommendation for Hailey. She volunteered to be a representative at our Dual Degree Orientation, and took time to talk about her past experiences like: how to settle into a new country/city, how to get accustomed to a Canadian classroom and teaching style, how to get settled in a new university campus, and more. She is professional, conscientious and always seems eager to help. She volunteered to help right away and she made sure to ask me questions on how to prepare for her role in the dual degree orientation, so she would be well prepared for it. Also, I believe being a dual degree alumni shows that she is driven and determined because getting 2 degrees from 2 different universities/countries is an amazing feat. This also shows she has great working capacity in two different languages – Mandarin and English. I think she would be a great asset in any business, company or organisation.
